category_title: Students with aggressive behaviors and impulse control difficulties who connect through animal-related interests
scenario_title: Transitioning from free choice to cleanup
minimal_context: Dominic is playing with blocks during free choice time and needs to transition to cleanup.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Free choice time is over, it is time to clean up the blocks.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Takes materials away from another child) No.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to start cleaning up now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Hits the other child) I am playing with these.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Becomes frustrated and throws the blocks) No clean up!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Free choice time is over, it is time to clean up the blocks.

STUDENT: (Takes materials away from another child) No.

TUTOR: We need to start cleaning up now.

STUDENT: (Hits the other child) I am playing with these.

TUTOR: Please put the blocks away.

STUDENT: (Becomes frustrated and throws the blocks) No clean up!

task.content: Transitioning from free choice to cleanup

context.environment: General classroom behavior during free choice time
context.social_setting: interacting with other children and an intervention specialist

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: As children transitioned from free choice to cleanup
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: engage in destructive behavior, such as throwing blocks

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: hit the other children and take materials away from them
